properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I stand upon the solid Rock of faith in Christ This steadfast hope shall not Break apart within the trial I am assured His promises will never fail As long as life remains He is faithful

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is patient God is kind He does not envy He does not boast His ways are higher than my own, His thoughts consume the great unknown Of this alone I am sure My God is love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I draw my breath under His created windswept sky I know my hope shall last Long after my flesh retires From dusk until the dawn He calls His children home His righteous love outlasts generations

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is Almighty God Elohim Maker of the earth, He is the Lord of hosts, Heaven's King God of endless worth, His kingdom stands above Every power Every living soul, His love is like the sun Ever true, shining over all
